description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and light-colored exterior walls, likely clad in wood or composite panels. The front facade features a covered porch supported by several columns, with a wide entryway and a paved walkway leading up to it. Large windows are present on the side, allowing for ample natural light, while the rear and one side have minimal fenestration, emphasizing privacy. The structure sits on a circular plot of grass bordered by a paved area, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on horizontal lines and open outdoor space. The materials and finishes give it a contemporary, minimalist appearance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light wood exterior, and a covered front porch supported by columns. Large windows and a paved walkway enhance its contemporary, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a plain wall with a single door and minimal windows, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, multiple supporting columns, and the main entrance with a paved walkway.
description_view_2: Side view displaying large windows and the extension of the porch area, with visible paved paths.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with a single door and a simple, unadorned facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side windows and minimal rear windows
